arts.ttl: Andre Onana DROPPED for Man Utd's trip to Newcastle after Lyon horror show
arts.sum: Andre Onana will not be in goal when Manchester United face Newcastle at St James' Park on Sunday having not travelled with the team to Tyneside following his difficult spell

arts.ttl: Andre Onana left out of Manchester United squad to face Newcastle after errors
arts.sum: The goalkeeper has endured a difficult week on and off the pitch

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe now has dream Newcastle dilemma with one key decision up in the air
arts.sum: Once Anthony Gordon returns to full fitness, Howe will have that particular quandary to solve as debate is split over who starts on the left of Newcastle United’s attack in the coming weeks. Quizzed this week over a message to Barnes regarding his playing time, the Newcastle boss responded: "I think it’s continue to take your chance.

arts.ttl: Manchester United keeper Onana rested for Premier League trip to Newcastle
arts.sum: André Onana culpable for both goals in Lyon on Thursday Off-field problems add to Amorim’s desire to protect him André Onana has been rested by Ruben Amorim for Manchester United’s trip to Newcastle on Sunday, after the No 1 was culpable for both goals in Thursday’s 2-2 Europa League draw at Lyon. While Altay Bayindir is set to make his Premier League debut at St James’ Park, the 29-year-old is likely to be recalled for Thursday’s quarter-final, second leg at Old Trafford, the Guardian understands. Onana was left behind when United travelled to Tyneside on Saturday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Marcus Rashford Set for ‘Showdown Talks’ at Man Utd This Summer
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim and Marcus Rashford are set to hold crunch talks over his Manchester United future this summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool ‘Accelerating’ Move to Sign ‘Absurd’ Forward Alongside Isak
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to step up their interest in Sheffield United's Ryan One.

arts.ttl: Newcastle Want to Sign ‘Seriously Talented’ Star in Shock Transfer for Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United are, according to recent reports, keen admirers of this sensational midfielder who has been tearing up the Championship.

arts.ttl: Source: Man United's Onana dropped for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: André Onana has been left out of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Newcastle on Sunday, a source has told ESPN, following heavy criticism of performance against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘reignite interest’ in Japan goalkeeper amid Onana errors
arts.sum: Manchester United have reignited their interest in Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki, amid concerns over Andre Onana’s performances at Old Trafford. Onana was at fault for both goals as Manchester United drew 2-2 at Lyon in their Europa League quarter-final on Thursday night. arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand confronted me after I dug him out – I told him he's in Man United's pocket
arts.sum: Former Crystal Palace chairman Simon Jordan didn't hold back in his assessment of Rio Ferdinand as a pundit - and he told the Manchester United legend exactly why
